nl_query: Identify all scripts where the cached total marks on the answer script row differs from the total marks on the latest active evaluation attempt by more than 0.5 marks, indicating a cache synchronization issue.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id, a.urn, sc.student_erp_id, sc.name, sc.synced_at, ea.total_marks AS attempt_total, em.total_marks AS cached_total, (ea.total_marks - em.total_marks) AS discrepancy
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   student_cache sc ON sc.id = a.student_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id AND ea.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id AND em.is_final = TRUE
WHERE  ea.status IN ('FROZEN', 'SUBMITTED')
  AND  a.evaluation_status NOT IN ('SUBMITTED')
GROUP  BY a.id, a.urn, sc.student_erp_id, sc.name, sc.synced_at, ea.total_marks, em.total_marks
HAVING ea.total_marks <> em.total_marks
ORDER  BY discrepancy DESC
LIMIT  100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Column validation failed: evaluation_marks does NOT have total_marks. Attempt total marks are evaluation_attempt.total_marks. Question marks are evaluation_marks.marks_awarded.
